stories.title: Erling Haaland puts on master class, pushes Norway...
Haaland sends Brazil to earliest WC exit since 199...
stories.summary: Erling Haaland scored two late goals to send Norway into the World Cup quarterfinals for the first time with a 2-1 victory that condemned Brazil to their earliest exit in the competition since 1990.

stories.title: FIFA suspends Balogun red card, can face Belgium
stories.summary: FIFA has suspended the red card U.S. striker Folarin Balogun received in the team's match against Bosnia-Herzegovina, making him available to face Belgium in the round of 16 at the World Cup.

stories.title: Belgium furious at Balogun U-turn: It's April Fool...
stories.summary: Belgium coach Rudi Garcia said he thought it was a joke when he first heard news that suspended United States striker Folarin Balogun was cleared to play in the Americans' round-of-16 match.

stories.title: Ronaldo: 'This will be my last World Cup'
stories.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo has admitted that this will be his last World Cup, as he prepares to face Spain with Portugal in Monday's round of 16 clash in Dallas.
